# kCTFontPostScriptNameKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Text ](/documentation/coretext)

- [ kCTFontPostScriptNameKey ](/documentation/coretext/kctfontpostscriptnamekey)

-  kCTFontPostScriptNameKey 

Global Variable# kCTFontPostScriptNameKey

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontPostScriptNameKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/kctfontpostscriptnamekey#Discussion)

The name specifier for the PostScript name.
